event: Survivors on a raft at sea amid shipwreck
description: A dramatic wash drawing depicting a makeshift raft on dark, turbulent waters. The raft, made of rough planks with a single mast and tattered sail, carries a mass of desperate human figures. Some are dead or dying, draped over the edges of the raft, while others raise their arms in anguish or signal for rescue. One figure falls into the churning sea at the right. A barrel floats nearby. The scene is rendered in brown wash and ink with white highlights, creating a powerful atmosphere of suffering and desperation against a dark, stormy sky.

_meta.title: Scene of Cannibalism for The Raft of the Medusa
